commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e92503c15d12db0f7dd1d4e3349c370e6e852445)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Codex-specific `/codex skills` renderer, narrows the local skills-list protocol type, and routes the skills subcommand through the new formatter.

PR surface: Source +94. Total +94 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch blocker from source: `CodexCommandDeps.codexControlRequest` returns `JsonValue | undefined`, while the new formatter requires `CodexSkillsListResponse | undefined`. No real after-fix `/codex skills` run is shown yet.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for both the type-boundary fix and real behavior proof; automation cannot provide the contributor's real `/codex skills` setup proof.

target.title: fix(codex): format skills using Codex skills response shape
target.body:
## Summary

- Format `/codex skills` with a skill-aware renderer instead of the generic list formatter.
- Type `skills/list` to match Codex's current schema: `data[]` workspace groups containing `cwd`, `skills[]`, and `errors[]`.
- Render each skill from Codex `SkillMetadata` fields: `name`, `description`/`shortDescription`, `scope`, `enabled`, and `path`.
- Normalize each workspace, skill, and error independently so one malformed entry does not derail the whole `/codex skills` response.
- Keep the existing chat-display escaping so mentions and markdown-like text are still neutralized.

## Verification

- `git diff --check -- extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol.ts extensions/codex/src/command-formatters.ts extensions/codex/src/command-handlers.ts`

Not run: tests, per maintainer instruction.
target.author: sjf

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
